Metadata.title: SUNBIOTAN | Professional Natural Tan without UV Rays
Metadata.description: SUNBIOTAN — melanin activator with 100% natural ingredients. Safe, even, and long-lasting tan. Available at authorised salons in Portugal and Spain.
Metadata.ogDescription: The natural treatment that respects and cares for your skin. Radiant, safe, and long-lasting tan — without UV rays.
Metadata.twitterDescription: Safe, even, and long-lasting tan with 100% natural ingredients.

Footer.tagline: Natural and professional tan. Elegance and expertise within your reach.

CookieBanner.description: We use essential cookies to ensure the website functions properly and to remember your preferences.

CookiesPage.title: Cookie Policy
CookiesPage.intro: This website uses cookies to ensure its proper functioning and to provide a better browsing experience. This policy explains what cookies are, which ones we use, and how you can manage them.
CookiesPage.s1Text: Cookies are small text files stored on your device (computer, tablet or smartphone) when you visit a website. They allow the site to remember your preferences and actions so you do not have to re-enter them.
CookiesPage.s2Intro: We use only strictly necessary cookies for the website to function. We do not use advertising, tracking or third-party behavioural analysis cookies.
CookiesPage.s2Cookie1Purpose: Authentication of partner professionals in the private area.
CookiesPage.s2Cookie1Duration: Duration: session (deleted when the browser is closed).
CookiesPage.s2Cookie3Purpose: Records your decision to accept or reject cookies.
CookiesPage.s2Note: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be disabled without affecting usability. They are not used for advertising purposes.
CookiesPage.s3Text: You can control and delete cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to block or delete all or specific cookies. Please note that disabling essential cookies may affect website functionality.
CookiesPage.s3Links: To learn how to manage cookies in your browser, visit:
CookiesPage.s4Text: We may update this Cookie Policy periodically to reflect changes in the technologies used or legal requirements. The date of the last update is shown at the top of this page.
CookiesPage.s5Text: If you have any questions about the use of cookies on this website, please contact us:

PrivacidadePage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacidadePage.intro: Sunbiotan is committed to protecting your personal data and privacy. This Privacy Policy informs you about the data we collect, how we process it and the rights you have, in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR — EU Regulation 2016/679).
PrivacidadePage.s1Text: The controller of your personal data is:
PrivacidadePage.s2Intro: We collect personal data in the following situations:
PrivacidadePage.s2Item1Text: Name, email address, phone number (optional) and message. Used exclusively to respond to your enquiry.
PrivacidadePage.s2Item2Text: Full name, business name, city, phone, email address and optional message. Used to evaluate your application as a Sunbiotan partner.
PrivacidadePage.s2Item3Text: Our Centres Map may request access to your geographic location to display the nearest Sunbiotan centres. This information is processed exclusively in your browser and is NOT transmitted, stored or shared with our servers. Permission is granted or denied through your browser and can be revoked at any time in your device settings.
PrivacidadePage.s3Item1: Responding to contact requests: performance of pre-contractual measures or legitimate interest [Art. 6(1)(b) and (f) GDPR].
PrivacidadePage.s3Item2: Processing professional applications: performance of pre-contractual measures [Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR].
PrivacidadePage.s3Item3: Essential cookies: legitimate interest to ensure the technical functioning of the website [Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR].
PrivacidadePage.s3Item4: Geolocation: explicit consent of the user through the browser [Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR].
PrivacidadePage.s4Item1: Contact form data: retained for 12 months.
PrivacidadePage.s4Item2: Professional application data: retained for 24 months or until a final decision is made.
PrivacidadePage.s4Item3: Partner area access data: for the duration of the contractual relationship and 5 years thereafter.
PrivacidadePage.s5Intro: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
PrivacidadePage.s5Right1: Right of access: obtain confirmation as to whether we process your data and access to it.
PrivacidadePage.s5Right2: Right to rectification: request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
PrivacidadePage.s5Right3: Right to erasure: request deletion of your data in cases provided for by law.
PrivacidadePage.s5Right4: Right to data portability: receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
PrivacidadePage.s5Right5: Right to restriction: request the suspension of processing in certain circumstances.
PrivacidadePage.s5Right6: Right to object: object to processing based on legitimate interest.
PrivacidadePage.s5HowTo: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at info@sunbiotan.pt. We will respond within 30 days.
PrivacidadePage.s6Text: Personal data is processed and stored within the European Union. Our cloud infrastructure provider (Supabase) maintains data on servers located in the European Union, in compliance with the GDPR.
PrivacidadePage.s7Text: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically to reflect legal or operational changes. The date of the last update is shown at the top of this page. We recommend you review it regularly.
PrivacidadePage.s8Text: For any questions related to privacy and data protection, please contact us:
PrivacidadePage.s8CNPDText: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority in Portugal:
PrivacidadePage.s8CNPDName: Comissão Nacional de Proteção de Dados (CNPD)

Hero.subtitle: The natural treatment that respects and cares for your skin, providing a radiant, safe, and long-lasting tan.

About.headline: What is
About.p1: It is a melanin activator, formulated with naturally derived ingredients, that progressively stimulates the skin's colour
About.p1End: . It works on all skin types, even the fairest or most sensitive, with visible and safe results.
About.p2: In addition to enhancing the skin's natural tone, SUN also treats, tones, and illuminates, with a gentle lifting effect, leaving the skin visibly firmer and more revitalised.
About.p3: Applied with a high-precision aesthetic device, through a micro-diffusion system that gently deposits the product onto the skin, ensuring an even, natural, and progressive tan.
About.detail3: Can be used all year round

01.title: Natural Tan
01.description: Even and uniform, adapted to each person's skin tone.

02.title: Deep Hydration
02.description: Immediate silky effect with intense and long-lasting hydration.

03.title: Firming Effect
03.description: Brightening and anti-ageing with a visible gentle lifting effect.

04.title: Intense Radiance
04.description: Radiant and luminous skin with a natural and healthy glow.

05.title: Immediate Results
05.description: Visible from the very first application, with no waiting.

06.title: 100% Natural
06.description: Active plant-based ingredients from sustainable agriculture.

07.title: Quick Application
07.description: Simple, fast, and efficient implementation at any centre.

08.title: For All Skin
08.description: Suitable for delicate, sensitised, or skin with special needs.

01.title: Immediate Flash Effect
01.description: Golden tan visible right after application, with a fresh and luminous result.

02.title: Natural Evolution
02.description: The tan develops progressively over the hours, becoming richer and more intense.

03.title: Ideal Result
03.description: The following day, the colour reaches its perfect point: natural, even, and radiant.

04.title: 7 to 9 Days
04.description: The tan lasts 7 to 9 days, depending on skin type and subsequent care.

CtaProfessionals.p1: Offer your clients the safest, most natural, and most effective tan on the market.
CtaProfessionals.p2: SUN is also available for beauty salons, spas, and industry technicians. Join our network of certified professionals.

CtaProfessionals.perk2Desc: Premium high-value services to differentiate your salon in the market.
CtaProfessionals.perk3Desc: Network of certified professionals with access to exclusive benefits.

ProfissionaisPage.subtitle: Offer your clients the safest and most natural tan on the market. Join the Sunbiotan certified centre network.
ProfissionaisPage.cta1: I want to be a partner
ProfissionaisPage.benefit1Desc: Complete and ongoing training by the Sunbiotan team. Your staff will be ready to deliver outstanding results.
ProfissionaisPage.benefit2Desc: Add a premium high-value service to your menu. The SUN natural tan sets your space apart in the market.
ProfissionaisPage.benefit3Desc: Access to Sunbiotan professional products at special partner conditions, with a 100% natural formula.
ProfissionaisPage.benefit4Desc: Join a curated network of centres in Portugal and Spain. Map visibility and marketing materials included.
ProfissionaisPage.benefit5Desc: Your space receives the "Sunbiotan Certified Centre" seal, conveying trust and quality to your clients.
ProfissionaisPage.benefit6Desc: Dedicated support from our team at every stage. You are never alone in the growth process.
ProfissionaisPage.step1Desc: Fill in the form below with your space's details. We review each application personally.
ProfissionaisPage.step2Desc: Our team will contact you within 48 hours to learn more about your project and space.
ProfissionaisPage.step3Desc: After approval, we schedule in-person or online training for your team.
ProfissionaisPage.step4Desc: You receive the products, materials, and access to the exclusive Sunbiotan partner portal.
ProfissionaisPage.formSubtitle: Fill in the form and we will contact you within 48 hours. No commitment.
ProfissionaisPage.placeholderMessage: Tell us a little about your space...
ProfissionaisPage.errorSubmit: An error occurred. Please try again or contact us directly.
ProfissionaisPage.successDesc: We have received your request. Our team will be in touch within 48 hours.
